locator.quote: raw carries naked LOSSES at full cash value

text: Raw reward carries naked LOSSES at full cash value; shaped neuters ~95 percent of naked windfalls.
Shaped neuters naked windfalls so directional luck earns nothing.

locator.quote: a term was added outside an accumulator

text: If the raw+shaped invariant breaks, it means a term was added outside an accumulator — fix the accounting rather than papering over it.
